description: Citrix NetScaler / ADC / Gateway edge-appliance CVEs — path traversal (CVE-2019-19781) and Citrix Bleed memory disclosure (CVE-2023-4966). Detection-only fingerprints.

shitrix_path_traversal_2019.description: CVE-2019-19781 (Shitrix) — Citrix ADC/Gateway directory traversal in the VPN/rewrite handler. Reaching /vpns/cfg/smb.conf via ../ confirms the traversal that enables the template-write RCE chain.

probes.description: 200 with smb.conf ini markers (global/encrypt passwords) = traversal reads appliance config = vulnerable to CVE-2019-19781.

citrix_bleed_memdisc_2023.description: CVE-2023-4966 (Citrix Bleed) — NetScaler ADC/Gateway sensitive information disclosure. An over-long OpenID configuration request leaks uninitialised memory (session tokens). Detection = confirm the vulnerable NetScaler build/endpoint fingerprint; exploitation (session-token replay) is operator-supervised.

probes.description: 200 with OpenID JSON (issuer/authorization_endpoint) exposes the AAA/Gateway OAuth IdP that CVE-2023-4966 abuses — confirms the reachable vulnerable surface. Fingerprint only; do NOT send the oversized Host leak payload here.
NetScaler Gateway login fingerprint (Citrix build banner / NSC_ cookies) — establishes the appliance is a NetScaler Gateway, the affected product for CVE-2023-4966.
